documentation.text:
@dev Convert a Unix timestamp to (year, month, day).
      Used to validate the date embedded in the ZKP public signals.
@dev Get the IPFS CID of an anonymous ZKP vote by its nullifier.
@dev Get all nullifiers (anonymous voter tokens) for an election — used for tally.

@dev Get the choice commitment stored for a given nullifier.
      Voter can verify their ballot by recomputing
      Poseidon(candidateIndex, voterSecret, electionId) client-side
      and comparing against this value — without revealing their choice on-chain.

@dev Get the published results for an election
 @param _electionId The election ID

allTrusteesCommitted().details: Check if all trustees have submitted their commitments

getChoiceCommitment(uint256,bytes32).details: Get the choice commitment stored for a given nullifier.      Voter can verify their ballot by recomputing      Poseidon(candidateIndex, voterSecret, electionId) client-side      and comparing against this value — without revealing their choice on-chain.

getResults(uint256).details: Get the published results for an election

getTrusteeAddresses().details: Get list of all trustee addresses

getZKPVote(uint256,bytes32).details: Get the IPFS CID of an anonymous ZKP vote by its nullifier.

getZKPVoteNullifiers(uint256).details: Get all nullifiers (anonymous voter tokens) for an election — used for tally.

hasVoterVoted(uint256,bytes32).details: Check whether a nullifier has already been used in an election.      Caller computes nullifier = Poseidon(voterSecret, electionId) client-side.      Wallet address is never stored — voting is fully anonymous.

publishResults(uint256,string).details: Publish the decrypted election results on-chain.      Requires that enough decryption shares have been registered.

setPaillierPublicKey(string).details: Set the Paillier public key (can only be set once by admin)

params._publicKeyN: The public key modulus N as a string

submitShareCommitment(address,bytes32).details: Submit a commitment (hash) of a trustee's secret share.      Can be called by the trustee themselves, or by admin (e.g. during automated setup).

params._commitment: Hash of the secret share (keccak256 of share data)
params._trustee: Address of the trustee whose commitment is being submitted

vote(uint256,string,uint256[2],uint256[2.details: Cast an encrypted vote using ZKP — proves eligibility without revealing identity. Public signals order (must match VoteWithICAgeCheck circuit):   _pubSignals[0] = ageThreshold   _pubSignals[1] = nullifierHash   (H(voterSecret, electionId) — prevents double voting)   _pubSignals[2] = electionId   _pubSignals[3] = voterCommitment (H(voterAddress, voterSecret) — proves registration)   _pubSignals[4] = currentYear   _pubSignals[5] = currentMonth   _pubSignals[6] = currentDay   _pubSignals[7] = numCandidates    (approved candidate count)   _pubSignals[8] = choiceCommitment (Poseidon(candidateIndex, voterSecret, electionId))

params._ipfsCID: IPFS CID of the encrypted ballot
